title: Kubernetes Security — Live Cluster Scanning & RBAC Analysis
description: k8s_security.py implements NSA/CISA Kubernetes Hardening Guide checks, RBAC analysis, network policy audits, image security, secrets management, admission control, and cluster scoring. test_k8s_security.py and k8s_security_router.py confirm the full stack. Gap: scan_cluster() accepts a config dict but does not connect to a live Kubernetes API — it analyzes static config rather than querying a real cluster.
missing: Live Kubernetes API integration: use kubernetes python client to query pods/deployments/rbac/network-policies from a real cluster via kubeconfig
Admission webhook: implement a ValidatingAdmissionWebhook that ALDECI exposes, blocking pod creation if it fails NSA/CISA checks
CIS benchmark auto-remediation: for selected low-risk findings (add resource limits, add readiness probe), auto-generate a kubectl patch command
